description: Recto: Top part of a letter to al-Shaykh al-Muhadhdhab. In Arabic script. Probably a letter of appeal for charity. Verso: Accounts in Arabic script, in a different, crude hand. Mentions various houses or places in Fustat (funduq al-[...], dār al-Fāḍil, Qaṣr al-Shamʿ, bayt al-Makīn) and various names (Umm Jalāl, Mūsā al-Faqīh).
